scripts.postbuild: mkdir -p dist/routes dist/middleware dist/services dist/db && cp routes/package.json dist/routes/package.json && cp middleware/package.json dist/middleware/package.json && cp services/package.json dist/services/package.json && cp db/package.json dist/db/package.json
scripts.db:reset: tsx ./node_modules/knex/bin/cli.js --knexfile knexfile.ts migrate:rollback --all && tsx ./node_modules/knex/bin/cli.js --knexfile knexfile.ts migrate:latest && tsx ./node_modules/knex/bin/cli.js --knexfile knexfile.ts seed:run
scripts.db:reset-dev: tsx ./node_modules/knex/bin/cli.js --knexfile knexfile.ts migrate:rollback --all --env development && tsx ./node_modules/knex/bin/cli.js --knexfile knexfile.ts migrate:latest --env development && tsx ./node_modules/knex/bin/cli.js --knexfile knexfile.ts seed:run --env development
